languages.text: "То, как ты удивляешься превосходству моего вида над твоим, человек, способно вызвать умиление. В теории. У кого-нибудь другого".
"The way you marvel at my kind's superiority over your own, human, might almost inspire a measure of endearment. In theory. In someone else."
languages.original_text: "То, как ты удивляешься превосходству моего вида над твоим, человек, способно вызвать умиление. В теории. У кого-нибудь другого".

traits.locale_text: "The way you marvel at my kind's superiority over your own, human, might almost inspire a measure of endearment. In theory. In someone else."
"The way you marvel at my kind's superiority over your own, human, might almost inspire a measure of endearment. In theory. In someone else."
"The way you marvel at my kind's superiority over your own, human, might almost inspire a measure of endearment. In theory. In someone else."
"The way you marvel at my kind's superiority over your own, human, might almost inspire a measure of endearment. In theory. In someone else."
"The way you marvel at my kind's superiority over your own, human, might almost inspire a measure of endearment. In theory. In someone else."

languages.text: “人类，你那副惊叹于我族凌驾于你们之上的样子，几乎让人觉得有几分可爱了。理论上，换作别人也许真会这么觉得。”
languages.original_text: "The way you marvel at my kind's superiority over your own, human, might almost inspire a measure of endearment. In theory. In someone else."

traits.locale_text: “人类，你那副惊叹于我族凌驾于你们之上的样子，几乎让人觉得有几分可爱了。理论上，换作别人也许真会这么觉得。”

languages.text: «La forma que tienes de maravillarte ante la superioridad de mi pueblo frente al tuyo podría inspirar cierto afecto, human{mf|o|a}. En teoría. Y en otra persona».
languages.original_text: "The way you marvel at my kind's superiority over your own, human, might almost inspire a measure of endearment. In theory. In someone else."

traits.locale_text: «La forma que tienes de maravillarte ante la superioridad de mi pueblo frente al tuyo podría inspirar cierto afecto, human{mf|o|a}. En teoría. Y en otra persona».

languages.text: « Votre émerveillement devant la supériorité de ma race sur la vôtre pourrait presque inspirer la tendresse, {mf|humain|humaine}. Du moins, en théorie... et si vous étiez quelqu'un d'autre. »
languages.original_text: "The way you marvel at my kind's superiority over your own, human, might almost inspire a measure of endearment. In theory. In someone else."

traits.locale_text: « Votre émerveillement devant la supériorité de ma race sur la vôtre pourrait presque inspirer la tendresse, {mf|humain|humaine}. Du moins, en théorie... et si vous étiez quelqu'un d'autre. »

languages.text: "Benim türümün seninkine, yani insanlara olan üstünlüğüne duyduğun hayranlık; neredeyse bir tür sevecenlik uyandırabilir. Teoride. Başka birinde."
languages.original_text: "The way you marvel at my kind's superiority over your own, human, might almost inspire a measure of endearment. In theory. In someone else."

traits.locale_text: "Benim türümün seninkine, yani insanlara olan üstünlüğüne duyduğun hayranlık; neredeyse bir tür sevecenlik uyandırabilir. Teoride. Başka birinde."

languages.text: "Die Art, wie du über die Überlegenheit meiner Art staunst, könnte beinahe ein gewisses Maß an Zärtlichkeit wecken. Theoretisch. Bei jemand anderem."
languages.original_text: "The way you marvel at my kind's superiority over your own, human, might almost inspire a measure of endearment. In theory. In someone else."

traits.locale_text: "Die Art, wie du über die Überlegenheit meiner Art staunst, könnte beinahe ein gewisses Maß an Zärtlichkeit wecken. Theoretisch. Bei jemand anderem."

languages.text: 「あなたたちが人間種を軽蔑する様子は、まるで愛おしいもののように思える。理論上は。他人の場合に。」
languages.original_text: "The way you marvel at my kind's superiority over your own, human, might almost inspire a measure of endearment. In theory. In someone else."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたたちが人間種を軽蔑する様子は、まるで愛おしいもののように思える。理論上は。他人の場合に。」
